text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While we're on our way home from a day out, I
tag along with Special Week as she stops by a
place she wanted to check out.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Here it is! I've been wanting to come by this
rental shop.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking about studying some old race
videos. I think they'd help me with my future
races.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, what should I rent today? The Tokyo
Racecourse collection sounds good, but so does
the Nakayama Racecourse collection...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This is tough... Which one do you recommend,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Got it! I'll rent it right now! Oh, and I'll grab
Suzuka's special feature DVD too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week seems to learn something from
watching the Tokyo Racecourse collection DVD
she rented.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Got it! I'll rent it right now! Oh, and I'll grab
Suzuka's special feature DVD too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week seems to learn something by
watching the Nakayama Racecourse collection
DVD.
